mentions.note: Gold weakness driven by speculators rather than macro; Cramer prefers structural gold plays like Agnico Eagle over commodity volatility.
Michael (WA) caller: 'Own the best' gold miner on selloff dip; margins elevated (gold prices up, oil/costs down, AI productivity up). Own Barrick.
Gold miner hit by Mali government asset seizure and fine, but stock surged today on supply shortage tailwinds; sector strong.
